name: Bhuntar Airport Taxis
description: Premium luxury cabs and sedans directly from Bhuntar Airport to Kullu, Naggar, or Tirthan Valley.

name: Beas River Rafting
description: White water rafting on the Beas river. 14km stretch of rapids. Safety gear and certified guides included.

name: Dobhi Paragliding Kullu
description: High-altitude tandem flights in the Kullu valley. Smooth thermals and breathtaking views of apple orchards.

name: Valley Moto Rentals
description: Royal Enfields and Scooters for exploring Kullu, Naggar, and Tirthan. Helmets included.

name: Himalayan Riders Manali
description: Royal Enfield Himalayan, Classic 350, and Activa available. Helmets and saddle bags included. Multi-day discounts for Spiti circuit.

name: Spiti Moto Rentals
description: Adventure-ready bikes with toolkit, puncture kit, and bungee cords. GPS tracker included. Pickup/drop at bus stand.

name: Hill Riders Shimla
description: Scooters and bikes for Shimla-Kufri-Narkanda circuit. Valid license required. Fuel not included.

name: Chandigarh → Manali
description: Sedan or SUV, AC, experienced hill drivers. 10-12 hour drive via Mandi or Bilaspur route. Pickup from airport/railway station.

name: Delhi → Shimla
description: Innova, Ertiga, or Sedan. Experienced pahadi drivers who know every hairpin. Overnight halt option available.

name: Manali → Kaza (Spiti)
description: SUV only — Atal Tunnel route via Kunzum Pass. 10-12 hours. Driver stays in Spiti for return trip. Fuel and tolls included.

name: Tempo Traveller Manali
description: 12-seater and 17-seater AC tempo travellers for group trips. Ideal for Rohtang, Solang, Spiti circuit.

name: Shimla Group Transport
description: AC tempo travellers for Shimla-Kufri-Chail-Narkanda circuit. Corporate and wedding group specialists.

name: Summit Himalayas
description: ATOAI-certified trek operator. Hampta Pass, Bhrigu Lake, Beas Kund, Pin Parvati. All-inclusive — tents, meals, guide, permits.

name: Parvati Valley Treks
description: Local guides for Kheerganga, Rasol, Grahan, and Chalal. Small group sizes (max 8). Camping gear provided.

name: Dharamshala Trek Co.
description: Triund, Indrahar Pass, and Kareri Lake specialists. Forest permits handled. Snow trek options Dec-Feb.

name: Billing Paragliding Club
description: Tandem paragliding from Billing (2,430m) with certified pilots. 15-25 min flight. GoPro video included. World Cup venue.

name: Solang Sky Sports
description: Short tandem flights over Solang Valley. Combo packages with zorbing and ATV ride available. Seasonal (Mar-Nov).
